content: Next.js on-demand revalidation (revalidateTag/revalidatePath) invalidates cache on mutation but only refetches on the next request to that path (stale-while-revalidate semantics) — good enough for near-real-time (seconds) if the admin action calls revalidateTag after every stock-affecting write. Supabase Realtime (Postgres CDC over websockets) gives true push-based updates without polling, but adds client subscription complexity/cost that is overkill for a low-traffic MVP with sub-second requirements loosened to 'seconds not minutes'. Official Next.js docs (nextjs.org/docs/app/api-reference/functions/revalidateTag) and Supabase Realtime docs (supabase.com/docs/guides/realtime/realtime-with-nextjs) both confirm these mechanics.
